title: Airline Group Warns of Close Calls

source.title: Airline organization leader warns of 'hundreds' of close calls every day

segments.title: Recent Close Call
segments.audioText: The most recent close call happened this weekend.
segments.transcript: The most recent close call happened this weekend.
segments.translationZh: 最近一次險些出事嘅情況就喺今個週末發生。

points.label: The most recent
points.explanationZh: most recent 即最近一次；新聞常用嚟帶出最新例子。

points.label: close call
points.explanationZh: close call 係差啲出事、險些釀成事故。

points.label: happened this weekend
points.explanationZh: happened 接時間，快速交代事件幾時發生。

segments.title: Landing Aborted
segments.audioText: Confusion as a Delta flight aborted its landing in Boston after a cockpit collision alert warned that an American jet was just 300 feet away on an intersecting runway.
segments.transcript: Confusion as a Delta flight aborted its landing in Boston after a cockpit collision alert warned that an American jet was just 300 feet away on an intersecting runway.
segments.translationZh: 一班達美航班喺波士頓中止降落，因為駕駛艙防撞警報提醒，一架美航客機喺交叉跑道上只相距 300 呎，場面一度混亂。

points.label: aborted its landing
points.explanationZh: aborted 係中止；aborted its landing 即取消原本嘅降落動作。

points.label: a cockpit collision alert
points.explanationZh: cockpit 係駕駛艙；collision alert 係防撞警報。

points.label: just 300 feet away
points.explanationZh: just 加數字強調距離好近；聽數字時先抓 300，再聽 feet away。

points.label: on an intersecting runway
points.explanationZh: intersecting runway 係交叉跑道，兩條路線有交會位。

segments.title: A Stunning Revelation
segments.audioText: Today, a stunning revelation from the organization that represents the nation's airlines.
segments.transcript: Today, a stunning revelation from the organization that represents the nation's airlines.
segments.translationZh: 今日，代表全國航空公司嘅組織披露咗一項令人震驚嘅消息。

points.label: a stunning revelation
points.explanationZh: stunning 係令人震驚；revelation 係披露或揭示出嚟嘅消息。

points.label: the organization that represents
points.explanationZh: that represents 後面解釋呢個組織代表邊一方。

points.label: the nation's airlines
points.explanationZh: nation's airlines 即全國航空公司，新聞用 nation's 令語氣更正式。

segments.title: FAA Response
segments.audioText: The FAA says most reported incidents are not close calls and that runway incursion rates have decreased more than 10% since last year.
segments.transcript: The FAA says most reported incidents are not close calls and that runway incursion rates have decreased more than 10% since last year.
segments.translationZh: FAA 表示，大部分通報事件並唔係險些相撞，而且跑道入侵率自去年以嚟已下降超過 10%。

points.label: most reported incidents
points.explanationZh: reported incidents 係已通報事件；most 表示大部分。

points.label: are not close calls
points.explanationZh: are not 用嚟澄清分類，唔係所有通報都等於差啲出事。

points.label: have decreased more than 10%
points.explanationZh: have decreased 表示已經下降；more than 10% 即超過百分之十。

segments.title: Receivers on Planes
segments.audioText: The pilots union and NTSB want Congress to require all planes to have precise GPS-based air traffic receivers that show surrounding air traffic.
segments.transcript: The pilots union and NTSB want Congress to require all planes to have precise GPS-based air traffic receivers that show surrounding air traffic.
segments.translationZh: 機師工會同 NTSB 希望國會要求所有飛機配備精準嘅 GPS 航空交通接收器，顯示周圍嘅空中交通。

points.label: want Congress to require
points.explanationZh: want A to do B 係希望 A 做某事；require 即規定、要求。

points.label: precise GPS-based
points.explanationZh: precise 係精準；GPS-based 即以 GPS 技術為基礎。

points.label: show surrounding air traffic
points.explanationZh: surrounding air traffic 即附近其他飛機嘅空中交通狀況。

sentences: The most recent close call happened this weekend.
Confusion as a Delta flight aborted its landing in Boston after a cockpit collision alert warned that an American jet was just 300 feet away on an intersecting runway.
Today, a stunning revelation from the organization that represents the nation's airlines.
The FAA says most reported incidents are not close calls and that runway incursion rates have decreased more than 10% since last year.
The pilots union and NTSB want Congress to require all planes to have precise GPS-based air traffic receivers that show surrounding air traffic.

vocabulary.example: Aviation safety is a major topic for travelers.
vocabulary.translationZh: 航空安全係旅客好關心嘅主題。

vocabulary.example: The pilot had to abort the landing.
The alert warned of a possible collision.
The report included a surprising revelation.
vocabulary.translationZh: 報告入面有一項令人意外嘅披露。

vocabulary.example: Officials reviewed the incident at the airport.
vocabulary.translationZh: 官員檢視咗機場嗰宗事件。

vocabulary.example: The rule may require new safety equipment.
vocabulary.translationZh: 呢條規則可能會要求新安全設備。
個螢幕會顯示附近交通。

phrases.meaningZh: 最近一次險些出事嘅情況
phrases.example: The most recent close call happened at a busy airport.
The plane aborted its landing after an alert.
The hearing brought a stunning revelation.
Most reported incidents were reviewed by officials.
The system shows surrounding air traffic.

speakingPractice.instructionZh: 由 00:05 跟讀 The most recent close call...，留意 close call 兩個字連住讀。
重播 00:08，先聽寫 aborted its landing，再補 just 300 feet away on an intersecting runway。
用 The FAA says... 練替換：The company says... / The airport says... / The report says...
用兩句英文複述：NBC reported a recent close call in Boston. Some aviation groups want more GPS-based safety equipment.

notes: 今日片段係 NBC News 約 1 至 2 分鐘嘅航空安全新聞，旁白由 Tom Costello 報道，主題係飛機近距離險情同安全科技。
聽力重點係航空新聞常見表達：close call、aborted its landing、collision alert、reported incidents、require all planes to have。
時間碼 00:05、00:08、00:25、00:48、01:16 可以逐句重播；先盲聽事件動詞，再看稿拆成短 chunk。
dailyLifePractice 會延伸到機場問延誤、改約時間同向同事解釋安全提醒，練自然美式日常口語。

dailyLifePractice.title: Asking at the Gate
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：你喺機場見到登機口有延誤通知，想禮貌問職員最新情況。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Hi, do you have any update on this flight? Is the gate still the same? Thanks, I'll keep an eye on the board.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Hi, do you have any update on this flight?
lines.zh: 你好，請問呢班機有冇最新消息？

lines.speaker: Agent
lines.en: We're waiting for one more update from operations.
lines.zh: 我哋仲等緊營運部門一個最新消息。

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Is the gate still the same?

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Thanks, I'll keep an eye on the board.

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Do you have any update on...? 好自然又有禮貌，適合問航班、預約、維修進度。keep an eye on the board 即留意顯示屏，喺機場好實用。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 this flight 換成 boarding、the delay 或 the gate change。
drills.example: Do you have any update on boarding?

drills.label: Quick repeat
drills.prompt: 跟讀 Is the gate still the same? 三次，語氣保持友善。
drills.example: Is the gate still the same?

dailyLifePractice.title: Explaining a Small Delay
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：交通或航班有少少阻滯，你想快速通知朋友可能遲到。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Quick heads-up: my flight is running late. I might get there about fifteen minutes later than planned. Thanks for being flexible.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Quick heads-up: my flight is running late.
lines.zh: 提提你：我班機有啲延誤。

lines.speaker: Friend
lines.en: No worries. Thanks for letting me know.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: I might get there about fifteen minutes later than planned.
lines.zh: 我可能會比原定遲大約十五分鐘到。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: Quick heads-up 係好自然嘅『先通知你一聲』。Thanks for being flexible 比淨係講 sorry 更正面，適合輕微改時間。

drills.label: Polite rephrase
drills.prompt: 用 I might get there about... later than planned 講一個遲到時間。
drills.example: I might get there about ten minutes later than planned.

drills.label: Short response practice
drills.prompt: 對方話 No worries，你用一句英文表示感謝。

dailyLifePractice.title: Safety Reminder at Work
dailyLifePractice.contextZh: 場景：工作上有新安全提醒，你想用簡短自然英文同同事確認。
dailyLifePractice.audioText: Just a quick reminder: please double-check the equipment before you start. If anything looks off, let me know right away.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: Just a quick reminder: please double-check the equipment before you start.
lines.zh: 提一提：開始之前請再檢查一次設備。

lines.speaker: Coworker
lines.en: Got it. I'll take a look now.

lines.speaker: You
lines.en: If anything looks off, let me know right away.
lines.zh: 如果有任何嘢唔妥，即刻話我知。

dailyLifePractice.nativeNoteZh: looks off 係美式口語，意思係睇落唔太對路。Will do 係簡短自然嘅回覆，表示『我會照做』。

drills.label: Substitution
drills.prompt: 將 the equipment 換成 the schedule、the address 或 the form。
drills.example: Please double-check the address before you start.

drills.label: Say-it-your-way
drills.prompt: 用 If anything looks off... 講一個安全提醒。
drills.example: If anything looks off, call me before you continue.
